title: leucanthemum integrifolium
intro: Leucanthemum integrifolium, also known as mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum integrifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Leucanthemum integrifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
